message:
refactor(doctor,suite): extract path structs and decouple report artifact resolution

Consolidate smoke-test path construction into AppSmokePaths struct and
make smoke fallback error-resilient so terminal errors surface after
summary output. Decouple SuiteArtifactPaths from report file existence
checks by moving report artifact resolution into SuiteReportArtifacts,
preventing stale on-disk files from leaking into summaries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
